_law: P3.1 (ADR-031): the last human-verified fingerprint of Anthropic's plugin spec. tools/specdrift.py compares validate.py's ENCODED schema against this; a mismatch means either the validator drifted or the spec moved — either way it's a desk item, never a silent schema edit (constitution Art. I §5). The scout/spec-drift agent refreshes this from the live docs (fenced) only via the desk.
